Patch Set 1:

It looks like the tcagen2 service was deployed but failed to become ready within 30 minutes.  It's not related to the change here, but it's not clear why this happened.  (When a service does not become ready within 30 minutes, the plugin deletes the k8s Deployment and the k8s Service(s) associated with it, which has the unfortunate side effect of deleting the logs.)

Patch Set 1:

We only recently added the healthcheck test for tcagen2, and it did not appear in OOM until change 104770, merged yesterday.  If you are seeing this a lot in the gating environment, it's possible that tcagen2 is slow to become ready or that it has some intermittent problem that we have not seen in our environments.
Patch Set 2: Patch Set 1 was rebased
